referral.title: REFERRAL

referral.noInvitationsDesc: Start sharing your link to build your initial Tier 1 network.
referral.perReferralDesc: Earned for each new user you invite
referral.securityDesc: Vision Chain uses a neural fraud detection system to verify network quality. Self-referrals and bot-driven invitations are automatically suppressed and may result in account restriction. Rewards are distributed in VCN and settled directly to your wallet.

predict.title: VISION
predict.description: Configurable autonomous AI agent for prediction markets. Non-custodial. No guaranteed profit.

hero.title: Vision Predict
hero.subtitle: Configurable autonomous AI agent for prediction markets. Your wallet, your rules, your risk. Non-custodial. No guaranteed profit.

gate.heading: Eligibility check
gate.intro: Polymarket prohibits US persons and several other jurisdictions. Some countries classify prediction markets as gambling. You must confirm you are not in a restricted jurisdiction and you understand the legal and financial risks.
gate.needAgent: You need a VisionChain agent api_key.
gate.ageStatement: I am at least 18 years old (or the age of majority in my jurisdiction, whichever is higher).
gate.notUsStatement: I am NOT a US person and I am NOT accessing this service from the United States.
gate.ackStatement: I understand Vision Predict is an experimental sandbox, that prediction-market positions can lose 100% of capital, and that past peak returns are not predictive. I am solely responsible for legal compliance in my jurisdiction.

rules.heading: Set your guardrails
rules.intro: All rules enforced server-side and (in Phase 3) on-chain via authority.grant.

strategy.heading: Pick a strategy
strategy.presetDesc: LLM monitors news + market mispricing within your allowed categories. Conservative position sizing.
strategy.customDesc: Bring your own decision prompt. You define the edge. (Phase 3 will expose prompt editor.)

authority.heading: Activate enrollment
authority.intro: Vision Predict is non-custodial. You keep your own wallet. Enrollment records your risk rules and creates an authority.grant scoped to polymarket.bet. Live betting will not start until Phase 3 ships — you can pause or update rules at any time.
authority.walletNote: USDC on Polygon (chainId 137). Vision Predict will never request your private key.

console.betaWarning: Live betting (polymarket.place_bet) is not yet enabled. Phase 3 will activate order placement against Polymarket's CLOB on Polygon. Phase 1 captures your risk rules and authority scope so you are ready when Phase 3 ships.

empty.title: Start by listing markets
empty.subtitle: Use the filters above to narrow by category or sort order, then click List markets to fetch live Polymarket prices.

simulate.title: Simulate market
simulate.note_warning: Do not paste personal data; sent to Google Gemini.
simulate.market_price_unavail: Market price unavailable — fair price not comparable.
simulate.charged_warning: You were charged {{amount}} VCN despite this error.
simulate.disclaimer: Paper outcome only. No funds were committed. Past simulated returns do not predict future real returns.

trace.title: Decision Trace
trace.empty: No simulations yet. Try Market Intelligence above.
trace.paper_pnl_tooltip: This is a simulated outcome. No funds were committed. Past simulated returns do not predict future real returns.

staking.title: VALIDATOR
staking.description: Stake VCN to become a bridge validator. Secure cross-chain transfers and earn rewards.
staking.enterSpendingPassword: Enter your spending password to authorize this staking transaction.
staking.howItWorksDesc: Validators earn a share of bridge fees proportional to their stake. If a validator submits an invalid proof and is successfully challenged,
staking.stakeSlashedDesc: of their stake is slashed and awarded to the challenger. Minimum stake:
staking.cooldownDesc: After requesting unstake, your tokens will be locked for
staking.connectingWallet: Please wait while we connect to your wallet.
staking.securityDesc: Validators secure the bridge by attesting to cross-chain transfers. Invalid attestations can be challenged within the 15-minute challenge period. Valid challenges result in slashing
staking.securityDescEnd: of the validator's stake, which is awarded to the challenger.

bridge.title: VISION
bridge.description: Transfer assets between Ethereum and Vision Chain with optimistic finality security.
bridge.enterSpendingPassword: Enter your spending password to authorize this swap transaction.
bridge.connectingWallet: Please wait while we connect to your wallet.
bridge.confirmApproval: Please confirm the approval transaction in your wallet.
bridge.confirmBridge: Please confirm the bridge transaction in your wallet.
bridge.optimisticSecurityDesc: Transfers are secured by a 15-minute challenge period. Validators stake VCN to attest to transfers.
bridge.challengePeriodDesc: Funds are released after 15 minutes if no valid challenge is submitted.
bridge.transferInitiatedDesc3: It will be available after the 15-minute challenge period.
bridge.enterPasswordDesc: Enter your spending password to authorize this swap transaction.
bridge.loadingWalletDesc: Please wait while we connect to your wallet.

nodes.title: COMPUTE
nodes.description: Manage your decentralized infrastructure fleet and validator licenses across the Vision network.
nodes.deployNewNodeDesc: Purchase a new Validator or Enterprise license to increase your mining output.
nodes.validatorNodeDesc: Standard participation node. Validates transactions and earns VCN rewards with a 1x multiplier. Ideal for individual operators.
nodes.enterpriseNodeDesc: High-performance institutional node handling data availability and AI compute tasks. 12x multiplier reward.

campaign.title: QUEST
campaign.description: Maximize your earnings through Vision ecosystem events, rewards, and community missions.
campaign.referralRushDesc: The race is on. Build your network on Vision Chain and unlock exclusive multipliers based on your rank. Every verified referral boosts your power.
campaign.questInitializingDescEnd: are coming soon in the next season update.
campaign.referralRushCardDesc: Invite your network to Vision Chain and climb the global leaderboard for massive VCN multipliers.
campaign.validatorStakingDesc: Earn min 12% APR up to 20% by staking your VCN tokens. Secure bridge network and grow your holdings.
campaign.communityAirdropDesc: Complete daily ecosystem missions to earn Vision Points and qualify for the first genesis airdrop.
campaign.vnsHuntingDesc: Secure premium .vsn handles before the public launch. Collectors earn exclusive naming rewards.
campaign.quantArenaDesc: Compete with 10M KRW seed capital using Vision Quant strategies. Top 3 traders win VCN + RP prizes. Round 1 ends Mar 20.

footer.tagline: Building the future of decentralized finance.

hero.subtitle: The Next Generation Blockchain

cex.title: Quant
cex.description: Connect your exchange API and set up strategy-based trading agents.
cex.noAssetsFound: No assets found. Sync your exchange to load data.
cex.noExchangesDesc: Connect your exchange API keys to view your complete portfolio, get AI analysis, and track your investments.
cex.encryptionDesc: Your API keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM and stored securely on our servers. We only require read-only permissions.
cex.securityNote: Keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM and never stored in plaintext. Only read-only access is required.
cex.copyIpDesc: Copy this IP address and add it to your exchange API whitelist.
cex.whyRequiredDesc: Korean exchanges (Upbit, Bithumb) require IP whitelisting for security. Only requests from whitelisted IPs can access your account data. Our server uses a fixed IP to securely fetch your portfolio.
cex.pcAccessNotice: You must complete the setup below from a PC web browser logged into the exchange website. Open API settings are not available in mobile apps.
cex.upbitStep1: On your PC, go to the Upbit Open API Management page:
cex.upbitStep2: Agree to the Open API Terms of Use. (One-time only)
cex.upbitStep5Prefix: Complete verification, then copy the issued
cex.bithumbStep1: On your PC, go to the Bithumb API Management page:
cex.bithumbStep2: Agree to the Open API Terms of Use. (One-time only)
cex.bithumbStep5Prefix: Complete registration, then copy the issued
cex.finalStepConnect: Paste the copied keys into Vision Chain's 'Connect Exchange' dialog and connect.
cex.securityBestPracticeDesc: Always grant only read-only (balance inquiry) permissions. Never enable withdrawal or trading permissions for third-party services.
cex.fillBothKeys: Please fill in both Access Key and Secret Key.
